text: Complete each sentence below using the most appropriate term from the box. Each term may be used once or not at all. _____ is a process where an object loses its magnetic properties. _____ refers to the area around a magnet where magnetic forces can be detected. When a magnet is _____, it has the ability to attract other magnets or ferromagnetic materials. The _____ of a magnet is the point where the magnetic field is strongest. The Earth's _____ is what causes a compass needle to point towards the North Pole, which becomes a _____ when it is _____, but the area around it is still part of the Earth's _____, and the Earth itself can become _____ over time.
